IMDb_ID.description: IMDb ID of the artist (e.g., nm0000154). ASCII ONLY.

Name_DIRECTOR_WRITER_CAST.description: Full name of the artist in UPPERCASE. ASCII ONLY. No accented characters or special symbols.

Birthday.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use 0000-MM-DD if year unknown, 0000-00-00 if completely unknown. ASCII ONLY.

Gender.description: Gender of the artist. ASCII ONLY.

Race.description: Race of the artist. ASCII ONLY.

Nationality.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (USA, BRA, GBR, FRA, JPN) or UNK. ASCII ONLY.

Birthplace.description: Birthplace in format CITY, STATE/PROVINCE, COUNTRY_CODE (e.g., PEEKSKILL, NEW YORK, USA). Use UNKNOWN if unavailable. ASCII ONLY. No accented characters.

Religion.description: Religion of the artist. ASCII ONLY.

Ethnicity.description: Short description of ethnic or cultural background (e.g., ITALIAN-AMERICAN, AFRO-BRAZILIAN). Use UNKNOWN if unavailable. ASCII ONLY. No accented characters.
